title: Football World Cup Editorial Wallpaper AI
sourceTitle: Football World Cup Editorial Wallpaper AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 cinematic football World Cup smartphone wallpaper for fictional football player Ari Tanaka in blue-gold national team jersey, intense profile portrait, built around premium sports-campaign typography and TANAKA / FIFA WORLD CUP 2026. Subject: fictional football player Ari Tanaka in blue-gold national team jersey, intense profile portrait fills the frame as the dominant chest-up athlete, with photoreal skin texture, detailed jersey fabric, visible crest detail when supplied, and a confident off-camera gaze. Scene: night stadium glow, blue-gold rim lighting, floating sparks, premium campaign poster typography and match-day smoke sets the stadium atmosphere with smoke, floating embers, rim light in team or country colors, and dramatic match-night depth. Composition: Fixed vertical smartphone wallpaper composition: chest-up portrait occupies about 85-90 percent of the frame, subject slightly right of center, extreme close-up presence, head turned slightly to the side, massive surname typography running vertically on the left, event line near the bottom center, and tight center-safe framing. Signature Elements: Floating embers, atmospheric smoke, team-color rim light, premium jersey detail, massive vertical surname type, FIFA World Cup campaign energy when supplied by the source, and AAA sports key-art intensity. Style: Luxury editorial football photography blended with premium global sports marketing, AAA game key-visual polish, Unreal Engine 5 rendering quality, ultra-sharp focus, high contrast, and 8K poster finish. Color Palette: Team or country color rim lighting drives the palette, supported by deep stadium blacks, smoke gray, ember orange, crisp jersey detail, and high-contrast cinematic shadows. Lighting: Dramatic colored rim light, atmospheric stadium haze, ember glow, strong facial contouring, glossy fabric highlights, and deep editorial shadows. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: TANAKA / FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 is integrated as the public poster text: a huge readable surname on the left side plus a compact event line near the bottom center. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
